body.title: Register discord_bot device in skeleton registry + web UI
body.result: DiscordBotShim.start() now calls registry.register(); device-id='discord-bot' appears in /api/device/list when shim starts
body.intention: I intend that the discord_bot device becomes a visible, registered bus participant in the web UI.
body.description:
devices/discord_bot/ exists in UnseenUniversity with device.py, shim.py, bot.py but the skeleton DeviceRegistry only shows ['skeleton']. The device needs to be registered so it appears in the web UI bus devices list.

**Affected files:** skeleton/registry.py, devices/discord_bot/__init__.py, devices/web_server/server.py
**Design rules:** skeleton/ owns the flat-file registry; no Postgres dependency; BaseDevice/BaseShim contract
**Scope boundary:** In scope: register discord_bot device so it appears in web UI. Out of scope: Discord API functionality changes.
**Completion criteria:** discord_bot appears in the registered device list from DeviceRegistry.list_devices(); web UI /devices shows it; existing tests pass.
